completed_steps.summary: Loaded documentation requirements concept (12 project types). Selected 'backend' + 'web' rows for two parts.
No existing index.md in docs/. Mode=initial_scan, scan_level=deep, output language overridden to VietNamese per user request.
Detected multi-part repo: backend/ (FastAPI Python 3.13) + frontend/ (Next.js 16). Verified via README, src/main.py imports, package.json presence.

Read project_knowledge artifacts: README.md (full ERD), _bmad-output/planning-artifacts/architecture.md (full ADD), epics.md (14 epics + FR mapping), product-brief, ux-design-specification (UX-DR1..21), prd/index. Adequate grounding obtained.

Deep-scanned: backend/src/main.py, api/v1/patterns.py, api/dependencies.py, core/database.py, patterns/engine.py, patterns/formulas.py. Frontend: store/designStore.ts (partial), package.json, components tree (client/dashboard, client/design, ui/), app routes ((auth), (customer), (workplace)).

Extracted stack from requirements.txt + frontend/package.json. Backend: FastAPI ≥0.133, Pydantic ≥2.12, SQLAlchemy ≥2.0, asyncpg ≥0.30, langgraph ≥1.0, ezdxf ≥1.4, bcrypt, python-jose, aiosmtplib. Frontend: Next 16.1.6, React 19.2.3, NextAuth 5.0-beta.30, Zustand 5.0.11, TanStack Query 5.90.21, TailwindCSS v4, Framer Motion 12.35.2, Radix UI.

Identified 30 routers in api/v1/, ~30 services, 24 models files, 30 SQL migrations (001 → 030). Pattern Engine (Epic 11) endpoints: 6 (POST sessions, POST generate, GET session, GET pieces export, GET sessions batch export, POST orders attach-pattern).

Frontend route groups: (auth), (customer), (workplace). 18 server actions in app/actions/. 13 client component subdomains. 3 custom hooks (useAutoFit, useMorphing, usePatternSession). 20 type files. Stores: cartStore, designStore. NextAuth v5 + proxy.ts pattern.

Generated 11 Vietnamese documentation files in docs/: index.md, 01-tong-quan-du-an.md, 02-kien-truc-he-thong.md, 03-tech-stack.md, 04-co-so-du-lieu.md, 05-backend.md, 06-frontend.md, 07-pattern-engine.md, 08-luong-nghiep-vu.md, 09-bao-mat-da-tenant.md, 10-testing-va-trien-khai.md.
State file updated with full outputs_generated list. Workflow marked complete. Resume not needed.

resume_instructions: Workflow complete. To extend documentation for a specific module, re-run /bmad-document-project and choose 'Deep-dive into specific area' (e.g., Pattern Engine, AI Bespoke Engine, Order Workflow).
